info.english_meaning: to lose sensesto faint to be foolish to err

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'yastizyastO punarvasU yezAM ta ime tizyapunarvasavaH unmugDAstizyAdaya eva viparyAsena dfSyamAnA bahuvrIhiRocyante' (pA0 1263 sUtre vfttiH) unmugDA vyAmugDAH saMSayitA BrAnte rvizayatAM gatAH kartfDarmo'DikaraRa Aropyate aviviktA iti tu tAtparyArTaH
'paraneyo'graRIryasya sa mArgAnpratimuhyati' (BA0 saBA0 554) mArgezvASrayaRIyezu vimuhyatItyarTaH pratiH karmapravacanIyo vA syAt
